---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, integration, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing in the current set of tools?

## Proposed solution

What would the ideal behavior look like? If proposing a new MCP tool, sketch its name, inputs, and outputs.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why they don't fit.

## Additional context

Links to Meta Graph API docs, screenshots, example prompts you'd want Claude to handle, etc.
